title: Mostly harmless refactor with one real edge-case regression
instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt. Do not claim to have run tests.
diff:
diff --git a/lib/parse.py b/lib/parse.py
index 0aa..83d 100644
--- a/lib/parse.py
+++ b/lib/parse.py
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 def parse_limit(raw: str | None) -> int:
-    if raw is None or raw.strip() == "":
+    if raw is None:
         return 100
-    return max(1, min(1000, int(raw)))
+    return min(1000, int(raw))
